title: Like/react to an update directly out of email
excerpt: As the title says. Right now if you want to like an update, it opens the update and the corresponding board in a new tab. Nothing major, but it would speed up some processes in our team, especially when loading times are…

posts.author: dk_eom (Daniel Krutsch)
posts.cookedHtml: As the title says. Right now if you want to like an update, it opens the update and the corresponding board in a new tab. Nothing major, but it would speed up some processes in our team, especially when loading times are long.
